long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between mss58a.sr03.wdc06 Et13/1 <-> msr01a.wdc06 et-4/0/10. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19884
short_description: mss58a.sr03.wdc06 Et13/1 <-> msr01a.wdc06 et-4/0/10 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
